title: Devipuram
tagline: Devipuram — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Devipuram is a Hindu temple complex located near Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Devipuram is a Hindu temple complex located near Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India. Belonging primarily to the Shakta school of Hinduism, it is dedicated to the goddess Sahasrakshi (lit., "she who has a infinite eyes", a form of Lalita Tripurasundari or Parvati), and her consort Kameshwara (a form of Shiva).

topPlaces.name: Sabbavaram mandal
topPlaces.description: Sabbavaram mandal is a mandal in Anakapalli district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India. Its headquarter is at Sabbavaram There are three universities in the mandal Damodaram Sanjivayya National Law University Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy Indian Maritime University, Visakhapatnam Sabbavaram has an average elevation of 20 metres (66 ft).

topPlaces.name: Sabbavaram
topPlaces.description: Sabbavaram (Telugu: సబ్బవరం) is a village and headquarters of Sabbavaram mandal in Anakapalli district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Maredupudi
topPlaces.description: Maredupudi is a village in Anakapalli district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Anakapalle Mandal of Anakapalle revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Marturu
topPlaces.description: Marturu is a village in Anakapalli district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Anakapalle Mandal of Anakapalle revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Visakhapatnam Special Economic Zone
topPlaces.description: Visakhapatnam Special Economic Zone (VSEZ), also called the Andhra Pradesh First Economic Zone, is one of the central government special economic zones in India. VSEZ is located in Duvvada, 20 km away from the Visakhapatnam.

Its headquarter is at Sabbavaram There are three universities in the mandal Damodaram Sanjivayya National Law University Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy Indian Maritime University, Visakhapatnam Sabbavaram has an average elevation of 20 metres (66 ft).
Sabbavaram (Telugu: సబ్బవరం) is a village and headquarters of Sabbavaram mandal in Anakapalli district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India.
Maredupudi is a village in Anakapalli district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Anakapalle Mandal of Anakapalle revenue division.
Marturu is a village in Anakapalli district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Anakapalle Mandal of Anakapalle revenue division.

Visakhapatnam Special Economic Zone (VSEZ), also called the Andhra Pradesh First Economic Zone, is one of the central government special economic zones in India. VSEZ is located in Duvvada, 20 km away from the Visakhapatnam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Devipuram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Devipuram is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (24 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Devipuram?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Devipuram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Devipuram?
faq.a: Stays in Devipuram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Devipuram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sabbavaram mandal, Sabbavaram, Maredupudi, Marturu, Visakhapatnam Special Economic Zone.
